svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ SURF vs SIFT COMPARISON │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
SIFT SURF ──── ──── Keypoint DoG pyramid Hessian matrix Detection (Gaussian difference) (Box filter approx)
Descriptor 128-dim gradient 64 or 128-dim histograms Haar wavelet responses
Speed Slower 2-3x faster
Robustness Excellent Very good
Patent Was patented Was patented (expired 2020) (check license)
